items.question: Can I enroll in multiple courses at once?
items.answer: Yes! You can enroll in as many courses as you want and learn at your own pace without any limits.

items.question: What kind of support can I get?
items.answer: Our dedicated support team is available 24/7 to assist you with any course content, technical difficulties, or platform issues.

items.question: Are there any pre requisites of the courses?
items.answer: Most of our foundational courses require no prior experience. Advanced engineering and architecture labs recommend basic programming and command-line familiarity.

items.question: Are the courses self placed?
items.answer: Yes! All courses are 100% online, self-paced, and fit around your personal schedule.

items.question: How will I receive my certificates?
items.answer: Upon completing all modules and labs in a pathway, your certificate will be generated automatically and made available for download in your dashboard.
